title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama with multi-model conversations, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama supporting sync/async chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Async Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama API; chat, embed, pull, and list models.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that streams answers from a local Ollama server via the ollama-js client.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Custom n8n node to call Ollama chat/completion endpoints in no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with auto-scaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered applications in pipelines.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration injecting an Ollama4j client bean for Java web apps.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP library wrapping Ollama API with GenServer-backed connection pooling and streaming.

title: ollama-cli-ui
summary: Terminal UI for Ollama built with Bubble Tea (Go) offering model chat, logs, and resource monitors.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed chat, embeddings, and model management APIs.

title: ollama-rustico
summary: Lightweight Rust wrapper around Ollama HTTP API with minimal dependencies and tokio async.
